{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Thousand Swords of Binding Light
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Divine Treasure]] [[Thousand Swords of Binding Light]] costs 2250 points.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Thousand Swords of Binding Light]] is an expensive prize.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“The Thousand Swords of Binding Light,” she admitted, glancing away. “They’re too expensive.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
